Entries.{{ModId}}_FelixEvent2/f {{ModId}}_SKZFel:
none/follow/
                farmer 14 23 0 {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 14 18 2/
                skippable/
                viewport 14 20 clamp/
                addCookingRecipe {{ModId}}_Brownie/
                move farmer 0 -2 0/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 4 0 2/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "oof."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix -4 0 2/
                emote {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 12/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix -4 0 2/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "mmmmm..."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 4 0 2/
                emote {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 12/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Just a little..."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 1 0 2/
                emote {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 12/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Wait Huh?"/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix -1 0 2/
                pause 50/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "... "/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Oh! Hey @ were you hoping to get a drink? "/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I guess Gus didn’t tell you, he’s closed right now. "/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "For the first time in like five years, man’s dedicated. "/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "But hey, I can make it up for you, Gus said I could use his kitchen while he was away since my hotel doesn’t have one. "/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I’m making brownies! Come try some! "/
                speed farmer 3/
                move farmer -2 0 3/
                move farmer 0 -1 0/
                move farmer -6 0 3/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 3 true/
                move farmer 0 -3 0/
                move farmer 7 0 1/
                move farmer 0 1 2/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 2/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I’m not exactly used to Gus' kitchen, I couldn’t find anything in here. Hopefully he doesn’t get mad."/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "But the brownies should be good, here have some."/
                farmerEat 731/
                pause 1500/
                emote farmer 32/
                glow 128 0 128 true/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 -1/
                positionOffset farmer -1 1/
                positionOffset farmer 1 -1/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Wow! You must really like it! I want to give these to everyone in the valley to thank them for being so welcoming."/
                stopglowing/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Its small but hopefully it will mean something."/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Well, maybe not to Gus."/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 -1 0/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix -8 0 3/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 3 2/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 6 0 1/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 1 2/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 2 0 1/
                speed {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 5/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 3 2/
                end

Entries.{{ModId}}_FelixEvent4/f {{ModId}}_SKZFel:
none/follow/
                farmer 37 58 1 {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 39 57 2/
                skippable/
                viewport 39 57 clamp/
                move farmer 1 0 0/
                move farmer 0 -1 1/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 3/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Oh, hi @!"/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Do you know of any other stores around here besides Piere's and Clint's?"/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I knew this town was remote but only two stores is really crazy."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 2/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "What I want is..."/
                pause 500/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 3/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "New keyboard switches..."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 2/
                emote farmer 40/ 
                pause 500/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 3/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I know, not much chance of finding it here, Piere looked at me as if I was speaking Korean when I asked him."/
                emote farmer 28/ 
                pause 500/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Robin owns a shop deep in the forest? I have no idea how to get there will you help me please?"/
                emote farmer 28/ 
                pause 500/
                fade true/
                changeToTemporaryMap Mountain/
                warp {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 12 26/
                warp farmer 11 26/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 2/
                viewport 11 26 clamp/
                pause 1000/
                move farmer 0 0 1/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 0 3/
                emote {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 20/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Hey thanks for helping me today, Sebastian is a life saver."/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I’ll have to pay you back sometime soon."/
                move {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 0 5 2/
                end/

none/follow/
                farmer 64 15 2 {{ModId}}_SKZFelix 64 16 0/
                skippable/
                viewport 64 15 clamp/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "@!!"/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "Mayor Lewis just hunted me down like it was sport!"/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "He wants me to represent Pelican Town in the Zuzu city tour of Miss Ferngill."/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "What does that even mean?? He knows I’m a man, right?"/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "I hate to ask for your help again, but it’s not a JYP event, so I won’t have my stylist—and you always dress so nicely even though you farm every day."/
                speak {{ModId}}_SKZFelix "If there’s anyone who can help me represent Pelican Town its you!"/
                end
